name: WLF_GRW_CAREER_PATH_STEPS_VL
query: SELECT B.CAREER_PATH_STEP_ID, TL.NAME, B.DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, B.CAREER_PATH_ID, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, TL.LANGUAGE, TL.SOURCE_LANG FROM WLF_GRW_CAREER_PATH_STEPS_B B, WLF_GRW_CAREER_PATH_STEPS_TL TL WHERE B.CAREER_PATH_STEP_ID = TL.CAREER_PATH_STEP_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
